nasb.text: And Asa slept with his fathers and was buried with his fathers in the city of David his father; and Jehoshaphat his son reigned in his place.

esv.text: And Asa slept with his fathers and was buried with his fathers in the city of David his father, and Jehoshaphat his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 亞撒與他的列祖同睡，與他的列祖一同埋葬在他祖大衛的城裡，他的兒子約沙法接續他作王。

ccb.text: 他与祖先同眠后，葬在大卫城他的祖坟里。他儿子约沙法继位。
